import json, re

# The businesses that received reviews in 2018
business_ids_2018 = [
"businessid_13", "businessid_79", "businessid_66", "businessid_25", "businessid_59",
"businessid_91", "businessid_46", "businessid_47", "businessid_73", "businessid_67",

"businessid_68", "businessid_80", "businessid_82", "businessid_35", "businessid_45",
"businessid_20", "businessid_22", "businessid_14", "businessid_28", "businessid_77",
"businessid_27"
]

# From partial data known to have parking
has_parking_bike = ["businessid_91"]  # BikeParking=True
has_parking_business = ["businessid_47", "businessid_59"]  # BusinessParking with available spots
# businessid_83 has BusinessParking="None" (no parking)

# Count businesses with either bike parking or business parking
total_with_parking = set(has_parking_bike + has_parking_business)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps({
    "total_2018_businesses": len(business_ids_2018),
    "known_with_parking": len(total_with_parking),
    "parking_businesses": list(total_with_parking)
}))
